programme.title: Supermarket Sweep
programme.desc: Teams answer questions to earn time and advantages over their competitors before going on a supermarket shopping spree; the team that adds the most valuable items to its cart wins.

programme.title: Bruce Springsteen: Live in Hyde Park
programme.desc: "London Calling: Live in Hyde Park" is a concert video of Bruce Springsteen & the E Street Band's performance during the Hard Rock Calling music festival in Hyde Park, London on June 28, 2009.

programme.title: AC/DC - Circus Krone
programme.desc: Filmed at the Circus Krone in Munich, this concert features performances of "Rock N Roll Damnation" and "What's Next to the Moon" and more.

programme.title: Jimi Hendrix - Live at Woodstock
programme.desc: Jimi Hendrix's explosive interpretation of The Star-Spangled Banner from the Woodstock Music Festival remains one of the most definitive moments in rock history.

programme.title: Scorpions - Forever And A Day: Live In Munich
programme.desc: After 50 years on stages all around the world, Germany's Scorpions decided it was time to embark on one last tour. This fully authorized documentary follows the hard rockers from their beginnings as young music fans to the present day.

programme.title: Iggy Pop - Austin City Limits
programme.desc: The Austin City Limits Music Festival is an annual music festival that takes place at Zilker Park in Austin, Texas. The festival features more than 130 bands on eight stages for three days.

programme.title: B.B. King - Live at Montreux 1993
programme.desc: B.B. King was one of the most influential guitarists of the latter part of the 20th century. He was a frequent performer at the Montreux Festival, appearing nearly 20 times! With a superb backing band and a great setlist, this 1993 show is a must-see...

programme.title: Jack White - Live at iTunes Festival
programme.desc: ITunes Festival, is an annual music festival that takes place over a month in London. Sponsored by Apple Inc., it had its first edition in 2007.

programme.title: Elton John: Live in London 2013
programme.desc: Filmed at the Roundhouse in London, this concert film gives fans a live experience from start to finish; Elton John performs his hits: "Tiny Dancer," "Rocket Man," "Your Song," and many more.

programme.title: Andrea Bocelli: Live in Tuscany
programme.desc: Vivere: Live in Tuscany is a concert performed by classical singer Andrea Bocelli.

programme.title: Elvis: Part Two
programme.desc: A chronicle of the life of Elvis Presley, from his humble beginnings to his rise to international stardom.

programme.title: Festival Express (2004)
programme.desc: The filmed account of a large Canadian rock festival train tour.

programme.title: The Smiths: Under Review
programme.desc: Night Flight Presents: The Smiths - Under Review is a 90 minute documentary film covering the full story and music of The Smiths. It features rare musical performances; videos; TV appearances; and interviews with the band.

programme.title: Frontmen
programme.desc: Ozzy Osbourne is renowned as one of the wildest and craziest frontmen of all time.

programme.title: Frontmen
programme.desc: The story of how Bruce battled cancer, performed in Sarajevo and was an international fencer.

programme.title: Frontmen
programme.desc: One of the most famous frontmen in the world, David Lee Roth is unlike most lead singers.

programme.title: Frontmen
programme.desc: Famous for hits like "I'm Eighteen," Alice Cooper shocked and scandalized his way to stardom.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross chooses to make a pond in the middle of a darkened forest the subject of today's mood-evoking creation.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross creates palm trees that yield to stiff sea breezes as a sky of ominous clouds loom in the background.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: As the foliage reaches its peak of autumn beauty, experience the tranquility of a nice meadow, pond, and happy birch trees - all painted the Bob Ross way!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Feel the soft coolness of late summer air and drink in the beauty of changing colors with Bob Ross as he creates this refreshing masterpiece.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Watch as the sun comes up into the golden sky and creates an illusion of the calm morning sea in this painting by guest artist Audrey Golden.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Travel to a lonely hidden cabin in the frozen mountainous north country with Bob Ross -- another black canvas masterpiece to fall in love with.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Nicholas Hankins: Bob Ross' Unfinished Season
programme.desc: The glow of a midnight moon yields brilliant jewel tones in the surging surf of this dramatic Bob Ross seascape.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Autumn is the threshold to winter, but still with glorious color and warmth in Bob Ross' trees, sky and buttery ground cover.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Take a hike with Bob Ross to the southwestern region, see the beauty of fresh skies over sun-glistened mountains and silvery mere.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Grab a cold lemonade and follow along with Bob Ross as he leads you through wooded beauty into a hot summer swimming spot.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross captures a real 'dreamscape' on canvas -- soft rolling hills, birch trees and pretty lake; paint along and add your own touches.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Share the excitement of discovering a path leading to the edge of a quiet river - in an oval! - with favorite painter Bob Ross.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: In this brilliant southwestern scene, Bob Ross portrays a unique view of nature with clear blue skies, dry mountains, and a graceful river.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross creates a moment in time as the sea finds itself in one of nature's sudden cloudbursts; experience another oval masterpiece!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross spills an amazing cornucopia of red, brown, green and gold colors into this gorgeous fall mountain masterpiece - a real audience favorite.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross invites you to join him at a quaint little mountain-top home with a breathtaking view of distant snow-covered mountains.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Look out over the valley lake with Bob Ross and view truly majestic mountains and evergreens under the calm of soft, muted skies.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Relax with Bob Ross as the perfect picnic spot emerges from his paint filled brushes - quiet peaks on a tranquil lake and luscious green velvety grass.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Imagine yourself nestled in a Bob Ross cabin, hidden in the midst of the lush green forest surrounded by the sounds of nature.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Nicholas Hankins: Bob Ross' Unfinished Season
programme.desc: The final embers of the day provide a spectacular palette of blazing colors in the sky.

programme.title: Bob Ross: The Happy Painter
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at the beloved painter's journey from humble beginnings to pop-culture icon, how one local TV ad evolved into a phenomenon.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Dry mountains, spiny shrubs and cacti, take a drive deep into the desert with Bob Ross and enjoy this fantastic oval surprise!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Real or imaginary? It doesn't matter which as Bob Ross captures a great mountain and forest scene on specially cut plywood!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Step into an oval classic with Bob Ross and get inspired by the gorgeous browns and oranges of undoubtedly the most beautiful season of all.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Cross a frozen stream under the shelter of a grand covered bridge and enjoy the tranquility of a beautiful Bob Ross winter's day.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: An interesting way to frame two pictures! Bob Ross paints a mountain landscape from luscious summer to beautiful winter, both on one canvas.

programme.title: MacGyver

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Steve assigns Amy Devlin and Taylor Lucas, two police officers from the Vice Squad, to assist in solving the homicide of local pimp Milton Wilder. However, Taylor convinces her partner to take a temporary detour on their way to the investigation.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: As Lou Summers heads to the comedy club to host Mark's Man of the Year Roast, a driver in a nearby car shoots at him and misses, but Lou doesn't hear it because his hearing aids aren't on.
